section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Selections are black-filled cells. 4 asset columns, all SP. Transaction row is one continuous black band across all four columns (null). Value of Asset: A:None filled for PCLN only (PCLN column continues black one row below the Transaction band); C ($1,001-$15,000) for SPGI; D ($15,001-$50,000) spanning V and BOX. Type of Income: Dividends filled for the two middle columns SPGI and V; Capital Gains filled across all four. Amount of Income (diagonal staircase): E ($2,501-$5,000) for PCLN, F ($5,001-$15,000) for SPGI, G ($15,001-$50,000) spanning V and BOX. Note: tesseract skipped the 'E: $2,501-$5,000' label line but the row is present on the form.

uncertainties.read: entire Transaction row black-filled across all 4 columns
uncertainties.note: uniform black band with no P/S/E letter; likely formatting divider/redaction, recorded null for all four assets
